data: Was out smoking with friends and saw this thing.

Stationary craft in the air and after 30 seconds it began to move at very high speed before disappearing.
Rapid movement, side to side, up and down. Then stopped for 1 minute and seem to land behind apartments.
We saw something strange in the sky.
Right above 50' in the air no intense sound and triangular military style but with small plane tail aircraft like structures
Stationary (wasn't moving) and suddenly started moving erratically
A small red light that shifted and disappeared after 5 seconds, shining light behind it 10 min later
I witness this every night the sky is clear. They're up there all the time. They appear and disappear, moving in different directions.
Two stationary objects that subsequently flew.
Ring/Disc of white lights which remained stationary about 200ft above the tree line on the mountain.
3 lights like stars moving and 2 of them stopping
